title: Sign in to the admin dashboard
description: This test verifies that an administrator can sign in and reach the authenticated dashboard view.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify authenticated navigation sections are available

title: Sign in and reach the dashboard
description: This verifies an authenticated user can sign in and land on the admin dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed
Verify the main navigation is available

title: Keep the dashboard accessible after refresh
description: This verifies an authenticated user can refresh the dashboard and remain on the protected admin interface.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Refresh the page
Verify the admin dashboard is still displayed
Verify the authenticated navigation remains available

title: Remain signed in after refreshing the dashboard
description: This test verifies that an administrator stays signed in and can still access the dashboard after refreshing the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the dashboard to load
Refresh the page
Verify the admin dashboard is still displayed
Verify authenticated navigation sections are still available

title: Keep the dashboard available after refresh
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin remains on the dashboard after refreshing the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the login username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Refresh the page
Verify the admin dashboard is still displayed
Verify authenticated navigation sections remain available

title: Return to the login state after signing out
description: This verifies a signed-in user can sign out and is returned to the login state afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the login user field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the login password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the account menu
Sign out of the application
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the dashboard is no longer accessible

title: Stay signed out after leaving the dashboard
description: Verifies that returning to the app without a session shows the sign-in screen instead of authenticated content.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Verify the sign-in screen is displayed
Verify authenticated navigation sections are not available
Verify the dashboard is not displayed

title: Sign out and return to the login state
description: This test verifies that an administrator can sign out and is returned to the login state.

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Verify the login state is displayed
Verify the admin dashboard is no longer displayed

title: Open the articles section after signing in

steps.description: Navigate to /index.html
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
